authoritative_source.authority_status: official NLM 2026AA release/download/API documentation recorded; payload access not attempted
authoritative_source.observed_release: 2026AA UMLS Metathesaurus release files dated May 4, 2026; no files downloaded
authoritative_source.version_pinning_strategy: pin by UMLS release name, file date, file MD5, license agreement/appendix version, API version parameter, retrieval date, and local-only cache manifest after license review

artifact_contract.freshness_rule: refresh probe metadata when UMLS release, license agreement, source-vocabulary restrictions, UTS API docs, download files, MD5 checksums, or payload policy changes

fail_fast_probe_design.record_scope: one UMLS source governance record only; no CUI, AUI, atom, relationship, label, or release file row until license/API and source-vocabulary restrictions are cleared
required_outputs: candidate comparison or crosswalk shell when applicable
success_criteria: UMLS authority, release version, API key gate, and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
review handoff remains candidate-only and human-review-required

human_review_and_llm_policy.llm_output_allowed: metadata and review-assistance only until UMLS license, API key, release terms, and source-vocabulary restrictions are cleared

telemetry.source_version: UMLS 2026AA observed on NLM release/download documentation; no UMLS payloads downloaded
telemetry.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: UTS account/API key required before API or release access
source-vocabulary restrictions must be retained and enforced
large release files require local-only cache and checksum/version pinning
